issues.title: Settle grill-family decisions: writer-home + seed-once ADRs, epic-grill rename-vs-keep, format-doc homes
issues.description: The decision slice that gates the rest of PRD-010. Record the ADR for the grill family keyed by writer-home (each grill owns one artifact: setup-grill the scaffold/seeds, context-grill CONTEXT.md, epic-grill the PRD/ADRs), and the ADR for the context-grill PHILOSOPHY seed-once edge on Retro-loop-as-sole-change-path; both clear the alignment gate. Rule on whether the reframed Work-Grill skill keeps the published name execution-grill-with-docs or renames to an epic-grill name, weighing the breaking-consumer migration ADR-0003 names. Decide the home of CONTEXT-FORMAT.md (context-grill, which owns CONTEXT.md) and ADR-FORMAT.md (both grills offer ADRs, so its home needs a ruling). Fix the seed-once detection mechanism. These rulings determine how EXEC-092..096 are built and whether EXEC-096 is in scope.
acceptance_criteria: ADR recorded for the grill family keyed by writer-home; alignment PASS.

ADR recorded for the context-grill PHILOSOPHY seed-once edge on Retro-loop-as-sole-change-path, including the detection mechanism (an explicit positive marker, not an emptiness heuristic); alignment PASS.
A ruling on epic-grill rename-vs-keep-name is recorded with the ADR-0003 breaking-consumer-migration tradeoff weighed; the ruling sets whether EXEC-096 stays in scope.
The home of CONTEXT-FORMAT.md and ADR-FORMAT.md is decided and recorded so EXEC-092/093/094 can repoint links.
issues.notes: Filed from the PRD-010 breakdown 2026-06-14. Decision slice; its rulings gate EXEC-092..096. SETTLED 2026-06-14 (Team Lead grill): (1) rename the reframed skill to execution-epic-grill (EXEC-096 confirmed in scope); (2) two ADRs, one decision each (writer-home taxonomy; PHILOSOPHY seed-once edge); (3) CONTEXT-FORMAT.md home is context-grill, ADR-FORMAT.md canonical home is epic-grill with context-grill referencing it by path; (4) seed-once detection is a stamped sentinel line in PHILOSOPHY.md ('<!-- principles: unestablished -->') that the first established edit removes. The two ADRs still need authoring and alignment PASS to close this issue.

issues.title: Add execution-context-grill skill — owns CONTEXT.md, seeds PHILOSOPHY once; stamp + root mirror
issues.description: A new stamped grill that establishes the workspace's shared model. It writes terms into CONTEXT.md inline, term-by-term (carrying the existing skill's don't-batch convention; scribe stewardship between grills preserved) and never regenerates the whole file. It may write PHILOSOPHY.md only on first establishment, detected by an explicit positive marker, appending and never overwriting existing body content; on an absent or ambiguous marker it refuses and routes principles to the Retro Loop. The skill states its own write-guardrail naming the only files it may write. Stamping is by tree-walk so the new dir auto-stamps; framework-version.json records its hashes; the dogfood root mirrors Src-First.
acceptance_criteria: execution-context-grill ships under src/template/.claude/skills/; init tree-walk stamps it into a fresh Instance and framework-version.json records its hashes.
The skill name is execution-* prefixed and verified not to collide with a shadowing global skill (ADR-0003 rule cited in its rationale).
context-grill writes CONTEXT.md terms inline, term-by-term, never a full-file regenerate; scribe stewardship between grills is preserved.

PHILOSOPHY seed-once uses an explicit positive marker (not an emptiness heuristic); the grill appends and never overwrites existing PHILOSOPHY body; an absent or ambiguous marker makes it refuse and route principles to the Retro Loop.
The skill states an explicit write-guardrail naming the only files it may write.
Dogfood root mirrors the stamped copy (Src-First); package-qa PASS; alignment PASS on the new persistent skill.
issues.notes: Filed from the PRD-010 breakdown 2026-06-14. Seed-clobber and CONTEXT-clobber acceptance criteria added from the adversarial gap-hunt (Gaps 2, 3, 6), grounded in the phantom-wipe postmortem and the sprint-6 clerk re-serialize lesson.

issues.title: Reframe execution-grill-with-docs into the epic-grill: requirements pass + optional work-in-types pass; drop glossary duty
issues.description: The reframed Work-Grill skill runs a required requirements pass ('what must this body of work satisfy?') feeding execution-to-prd, plus an optional work-in-types design pass the agent offers when the work is design-heavy or on user request. The offer-gate states an explicit default so it is neither silently skipped nor auto-applied: the agent asks 'is this design-heavy?' and defaults to skip on no signal. The type pass closes on the semantic termination condition (every union variant handled, every optional field justified, nothing left unspecified, every seam specified on both sides, then a single axis-switch to call-graph and liveness), never a turn count; resolved types render inline and into ADRs, never CONTEXT.md. Glossary/term-sharpening duty is removed, now owned by context-grill. Stamp + root mirror; the skill dir name follows the EXEC-091 ruling.
acceptance_criteria: The reframed skill runs a required requirements pass feeding execution-to-prd and an optional work-in-types design pass.
The type-pass offer rule states an explicit default: the agent asks 'is this design-heavy?' and defaults to skip on no signal; it cannot be silently skipped or auto-applied.

The type pass terminates on the semantic condition (all variants handled, all optional fields justified, nothing unspecified, all seams specified both sides, then call-graph/liveness), not a turn budget.
Glossary/term-sharpening duty is removed from this skill; resolved design types render inline and into ADRs, never CONTEXT.md.
Skill dir name follows the EXEC-091 ruling; init stamps it and the dogfood root mirrors (Src-First); package-qa PASS; alignment PASS.
issues.notes: Filed from the PRD-010 breakdown 2026-06-14. Offer-gate default and semantic-termination criteria added from the adversarial gap-hunt (Gap 7, G1). Depends on EXEC-092 so glossary duty has its new owner before this skill sheds it. SETTLED (EXEC-091, 2026-06-14): the skill dir is renamed execution-grill-with-docs -> execution-epic-grill; ADR-FORMAT.md stays co-located here as its canonical home.

issues.title: Wire the grill family into PROCESS.md and CONTEXT.md; sweep every stale reference and repoint format-doc links
issues.description: PROCESS.md's grill node expands to context-grill (when the shared model shifts) then epic-grill (requirements plus optional design) then PRD then issues, and states the disk handoff: epic-grill reads CONTEXT.md by path and context-grill's term writes land before epic-grill begins. CONTEXT.md's Setup-Grill/Work-Grill glossary entry and flagged ambiguities update for the grill family, and its 'Format authority' pointer repoints to the settled format-doc home. A repo-wide reference sweep lands in this same change so zero stale references remain — per the PROCESS.md contract-sweep rule that EXEC-083 violated when AC-1 and AC-3 contradicted. Src-First then root mirror.
acceptance_criteria: PROCESS.md grill node expands to context-grill then epic-grill then PRD then issues, and states the disk handoff (epic-grill reads committed CONTEXT.md before it begins).
CONTEXT.md Setup/Work Grill entry and flagged ambiguities describe the grill family; the 'Format authority' line repoints to the settled CONTEXT-FORMAT.md / ADR-FORMAT.md home and resolves.

A repo-wide sweep for the old skill name and the format-doc paths (across *.md, hooks, settings, README, AGENTS.md, root CLAUDE.md pointer block) leaves zero stale references in src/template and the root Instance; the sweep result is recorded.
Every relative and absolute link to CONTEXT-FORMAT.md and ADR-FORMAT.md resolves after the move.
alignment PASS on the persistent-doc changes (PROCESS.md, CONTEXT.md); Src-First mirror to root.
issues.notes: Filed from the PRD-010 breakdown 2026-06-14. Repo-wide stale-name sweep (Gap 4, P1), format-doc link repoint (Gap 5), and disk-handoff statement (Gap 8) added from the adversarial gap-hunt; the stale-name failure is exactly the sprint-7 EXEC-083 contradiction.

issues.title: Rewire src/SKILL.md to the new grill layout and verify install to scaffold end-to-end via package-qa
issues.description: The npm install to scaffold path must still work after the split. Update src/SKILL.md's by-name references to the Work-Grill skills (the Preflight note and the Handoff step) and the Setup Grill's format-authority paths (the CONTEXT-FORMAT.md and ADR-FORMAT.md references the Setup Grill itself reuses) to the names and homes settled in EXEC-091. Then prove the full adoption path end-to-end: npm install to-execution, the agent reads node_modules/to-execution/SKILL.md, npx to-execution init tree-walks template/ and stamps the whole grill family into a fresh Instance, and every path SKILL.md and the stamped skills reference resolves. package-qa gates it.
acceptance_criteria: src/SKILL.md references the Work-Grill skills by their settled names and points the Setup Grill at the settled CONTEXT-FORMAT.md / ADR-FORMAT.md homes; no reference to a renamed or retired path remains.

package-qa proves the path: npm install then read node_modules/to-execution/SKILL.md then npx to-execution init stamps the grill family into a fresh Instance with no overwrite, and every path SKILL.md and the stamped skills reference resolves.
A fresh init yields a working Instance whose Setup Grill and Work Grill both point at real, stamped files.
package-qa PASS; Src-First (SKILL.md lives in src) with root mirror as applicable.
issues.notes: Filed from the PRD-010 breakdown 2026-06-14 at Brooks's direction: guarantee the install to scaffold path. Depends on EXEC-091 so the format-doc home is settled before SKILL.md is repointed (Gap 5).

issues.title: Upgrade path: migrate retires the renamed grill skill on existing Instances; doctor flags the orphan
issues.description: update only adds and refreshes template files and never prunes, and migrate has no skill concept, so renaming execution-grill-with-docs orphans the old skill dir in every already-stamped Instance, where the published name still resolves and runs the pre-split behavior. Teach migrate to detect a stamped execution-grill-with-docs dir on an already-stamped Instance and retire it under a versioned, idempotent, location-only migration that never touches a dir the user authored, and have doctor flag the orphan and name migrate as the fix. In scope only if EXEC-091 rules for a rename; if keep-name wins, this issue closes as not-needed.
acceptance_criteria: migrate detects a stamped execution-grill-with-docs dir on an already-stamped Instance and retires or relocates it under a versioned migration id — location-only, idempotent.
migrate never touches a skill dir the user added themselves (only the known published name).
doctor flags the orphaned old skill and names migrate as the fix.
Temp-dir test: stamp the old layout, run update, then migrate leaves only the renamed skill; package-qa PASS.
issues.root_cause: update never prunes template-dropped dirs (cli.js) and migrate knows only records and hooks, so a renamed skill is orphaned on upgrade.
issues.notes: Filed from the adversarial gap-hunt 2026-06-14 (Gap 1, P1). CONFIRMED in scope: EXEC-091 ruled for the rename to execution-epic-grill (2026-06-14), so the orphan/upgrade path must be built.
